Localization.Description: Attempt to perform an operation on a machine learning model

EventDescriptions.EventDescription: User {subject.account.name} is deleting machine learning model {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} deleted machine learning model {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to create machine learning model {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} changed machine learning model {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is unable to change machine learning model {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is unable to delete machine learning model {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}. Reason: {reason}.
User {subject.account.name} is changing machine learning model {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} is creating machine learning model {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
User {subject.account.name} created machine learning model {object.name} of the {event_src.subsys} service on host {event_src.host}
